name: Workfront Intake
description: Convierte mensajes de tu equipo en tickets de Workfront via Fusion. Detecta tipo de solicitud, extrae campos, confirma con el usuario y crea el ticket automaticamente. Funciona desde Teams, chat o cualquier canal.
author: QStrauss

agentSeeds..qaio/routines/routines.json: [{"id": "daily-intake-review", "name": "Daily intake review", "description": "Every morning: review pending requests, flag stale tickets, summarize yesterday's intake volume.", "prompt": "Review all pending intake requests. Summarize: how many came in yesterday, how many are still pending confirmation, any that are older than 24h without action. Flag stale items.", "schedule": "0 9 * * 1-5", "enabled": true, "suppress_when_silent": true, "created_at": "2026-05-12T00:00:00Z", "updated_at": "2026-05-12T00:00:00Z"}]
